sections.description: Native SEO control layer for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Manages title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, cache purge, and self-updates.
sections.changelog:
v2.4.0: POST /migrate-legacy endpoint — batch-copy rank_math_* values into rr_seo_* keys per post, with dry_run support and audit log writes.
v2.3.1: replace-all guarded by rrseo_replace_all_snippets custom capability; deprecation notice added.
v2.3.0: Schema model, preview endpoint, validation layer, audit log.
